alternatives.transcript: Technique is ill son, watch how I spill 1 He's the biggie, true pot, big Ellen, big pun Havoc on his streets, a stag, snitches, house ladies, children, watchers They produce the same catering Somebody raped our women, murdered our babies In the squiggly cracks and guns in the early 80s For those that murdered me shall stand before God To fall at the hands of faith and out comes the rod Bring it back, bring it back, Bring it back, bring it back, bring it back What the fuck is going on? I can't go to sleep Feds jumping out their jeeps, I can't go to sleep Babies with flies on their cheeks, it's hard to go to sleep it's both, 2 sixes twice, I couldn't go to sleep Ayo, we deep in the stands, we carry can guns, whippy got Hit her with the big shit, boom boom That's bad to Jeeva's spot, then past the league spot Don't pass my niggas again, you took a cheap shot I know it's fuckin' with me, niggas you mean shot You gon' be fellin' on face, you think the beef's stopped Call on the Terrians, call on the ambulance You've had a smile my nigga, you're more candy can't we do Taste the broads, these beats the laws Fuck with big balls, nigga motherfuckin' you That I can take was with yours I'm a nigga that made you mad When the rap wasn't doin' well I'm a nigga that gave you a hand Don't get mad Learn to love each other Don't get mad Cause it ain't that bad Cause it ain't that bad I want to be your love When you come too far It's in your hands Just be a man Get the jelly I just bought Talk with me I can't go to sleep, I can't shut my eyes They shot the father of his Mars building second time They shot Malcolm in the chest under his little seat Jesse Watson and they shot King on his balcony It's 4 of the martyrs, starby, grubby, childless walkers With the knowledge of ourselves and our forefathers Old Jack claims he heard the white bullshies quackin' Her husband head in the head, he tryna put it back in America's watchin', plus they eat lots of snack It's a bunch of this coal for intradayting counties But just like somebody, this is trick knowledge He tryna keep it to slaves and steal slave modalities Walkin' through park, you're drunk as a fuck, lookin' around like These thugs are so many to break this world down They got me trapped up in a metal gate, just stressed out with hate And this is givin' me no time to relax and leave my mind and meditate What should I do? Dab a blunt or a brew? Dab a 2-2 and run out there and pick this fucking violence to you? I can't I can't shut up son The power is in your hands Stop all this crying, be a man

paragraphs.transcript:
Technique is ill son, watch how I spill 1 He's the biggie, true pot, big Ellen, big pun Havoc on his streets, a stag, snitches, house ladies, children, watchers They produce the same catering Somebody raped our women, murdered our babies In the squiggly cracks and guns in the early 80s For those that murdered me shall stand before God To fall at the hands of faith and out comes the rod Bring it back, bring it back, Bring it back, bring it back, bring it back What the fuck is going on? I can't go to sleep Feds jumping out their jeeps, I can't go to sleep Babies with flies on their cheeks, it's hard to go to sleep it's both, 2 sixes twice, I couldn't go to sleep Ayo, we deep in the stands, we carry can guns, whippy got Hit her with the big shit, boom boom That's bad to Jeeva's spot, then past the league spot Don't pass my niggas again, you took a cheap shot I know it's fuckin' with me, niggas you mean shot You gon' be fellin' on face, you think the beef's stopped Call on the Terrians, call on the ambulance You've had a smile my nigga, you're more candy can't we do Taste the broads, these beats the laws Fuck with big balls, nigga motherfuckin' you That I can take was with yours I'm a nigga that made you mad When the rap wasn't doin' well I'm a nigga that gave you a hand Don't get mad Learn to love each other Don't get mad Cause it ain't that bad Cause it ain't that bad I want to be your love When you come too far It's in your hands Just be a man Get the jelly I just bought Talk with me I can't go to sleep, I can't shut my eyes They shot the father of his Mars building second time They shot Malcolm in the chest under his little seat Jesse Watson and they shot King on his balcony It's 4 of the martyrs, starby, grubby, childless walkers With the knowledge of ourselves and our forefathers Old Jack claims he heard the white bullshies quackin' Her husband head in the head, he tryna put it back in America's watchin', plus they eat lots of snack It's a bunch of this coal for intradayting counties But just like somebody, this is trick knowledge He tryna keep it to slaves and steal slave modalities Walkin' through park, you're drunk as a fuck, lookin' around like These thugs are so many to break this world down They got me trapped up in a metal gate, just stressed out with hate And this is givin' me no time to relax and leave my mind and meditate What should I do?

Dab a blunt or a brew? Dab a 2-2 and run out there and pick this fucking violence to you? I can't I can't shut up son The power is in your hands Stop all this crying, be a man
